name: @contentstack/venuscn
description: Venus Design System — Contentstack production UI components built on Tailwind CSS v4 + Radix UI

components.name: Button
components.description: Primary action button with loading state and asChild support.

components.name: Input
components.description: Text input with Venus styling. 40px height, 16px font, 4px radius.

components.name: Textarea
components.description: Multi-line text input with Venus styling.

components.name: Checkbox
components.description: Checkbox input with label support.

components.name: Radio
components.description: Radio button input with label support.

components.name: Toggle
components.description: On/off switch toggle control.

components.name: Field
components.description: Form field wrapper. Compose with FieldLabel, HelpText, ValidationMessage.

components.name: FieldLabel
components.description: Label for form fields. 14px semibold.

components.name: HelpText
components.description: Help text displayed below a form field.

components.name: ValidationMessage
components.description: Validation error message for form fields.

components.name: Tag
components.description: Removable tag/chip with optional close button.

components.name: Pill
components.description: Status pill indicator with variant colors.

components.name: Pills
components.description: Container for multiple Pill components.

components.name: Divider
components.description: Horizontal or vertical separator line.

components.name: Dropdown
components.description: Custom dropdown select with search support. Two visual variants.

components.name: Select
components.description: Radix-based select dropdown with Venus styling.

components.name: Table
components.description: Data table compound component. Compose with TableHeader, TableBody, TableRow, TableHead, TableCell.

components.name: TablePagination
components.description: Pagination controls for tables. Shows page numbers and prev/next buttons.

components.name: Search
components.description: Search input with icon and clear button.

components.name: SearchV3
components.description: Enhanced search input matching Contentstack V3 style.

components.name: Tabs
components.description: Tab navigation with pill-shaped container. Built on Radix UI Tabs.

components.name: PageHeader
components.description: Page-level header with title and action buttons.

components.name: PageSearchHeader
components.description: Page header variant with integrated search input.

components.name: PageFormHeader
components.description: Page header for form pages with back button and save/cancel actions.

components.name: FormSidebar
components.description: Right-side form sidebar with title, description, and metadata sections.

components.name: CategoryPill
components.description: Colored category indicator pill (audience, device, location, time).

components.name: StatusPill
components.description: Status indicator with colored dot and label.

components.name: TargetingCategoryCard
components.description: Card for targeting rule categories with icon and count.

components.name: RuleRow
components.description: Single targeting rule row with attribute, operator, and value dropdowns.

components.name: RuleGroup
components.description: Group of targeting rules connected by AND/OR logic.

components.name: TargetingRuleBuilder
components.description: Full targeting rule builder with groups, rules, and AND/OR connectors.

components.name: Card
components.description: Flexible card container. Compose with CardHeader, CardTitle, CardContent, CardFooter.

components.name: Badge
components.description: Small label badge with variant colors.

components.name: Skeleton
components.description: Loading placeholder with pulse animation.

components.name: Avatar
components.description: User avatar with image and fallback support. Built on Radix UI Avatar.

components.name: Alert
components.description: Alert banner with title and description.

components.name: Progress
components.description: Progress bar indicator. Built on Radix UI Progress.

components.name: Slider
components.description: Range slider input. Built on Radix UI Slider.

components.name: Dialog
components.description: Modal dialog overlay. Built on Radix UI Dialog.

components.name: Sheet
components.description: Slide-out panel from screen edge. Built on Radix UI Dialog.

components.name: Sidebar
components.description: Collapsible sidebar with sections, nav items, search, and checkbox filters.

components.name: AppCard
components.description: Application/marketplace card with icon or banner variant and install action.

components.name: Tooltip
components.description: Tooltip popup on hover. Built on Radix UI Tooltip.
